docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-05-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THER ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 4-8-03 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL SIX MONTHS.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-07-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 0CTOBER 7, 2003 @ 10:00 AM. AND THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 6 MONTHS.
